reviews.text: Our server Mia was amazing! She went above and beyond to make sure we were all taken care of. Wonderful service.

I am looking forward to my next visit!
Karina, Blake & Akiko always takes care of us - they are a joy and make it a fun spot at Local Public Eatery and an easy place to loose the pressures of the busy city.
Akiko and Ben were awesome! Super friendly and made the night better with how personable they were.
Elaiza and Akiko were amazing. Food and atmosphere was very enjoyable. Will go back for sure
My niece and I had the most fun being served by Elaiza and Akiko. Food & drinks were great but our servers were even better! We'll be back.

Truly a local treasure.  Elaiza and Akiko made this experience what it was. While the drinks and food were delicious the servers and management made it so special. If you dine here make a special request for Elaiza and Akiko, you won’t regret it!

I have been to local so many times and we absolutely LOVED having Karina tonight. She provides incredibly great service, is the sweetest and shows genuine care for her tables. The food and her drink recommendations were amazing. We can’t to see Karina when we’re back!
Karina was the best

Came for the food, stayed for the drinks. Amazing service and atmosphere! It was so inviting, and the staff made me feel really taken care of. Karina was a great server with spot-on recommendations (I’ll definitely be back for the open-faced steak sandwich) and Blake was so friendly at the bar and made great drink suggestions even when I was upset the Verdita wasn’t available. Can't wait to go back when its patio season!

I came to local for the first time yesterday and had the best experience! Karina and Blake really took care of me and made great recommendations and great conversation! Will come back just for them :)

Always a great time
Karina is the best!!
Karina is the reason I come back! My drink is never empty!!

I am looking forward to my next visit!
Karina, Blake & Akiko always takes care of us - they are a joy and make it a fun spot at Local Public Eatery and an easy place to loose the pressures of the busy city.
Amazing food and atmosphere, Karina and Christina were amazing very friendly and great service. They do their job very well!
Food and atmosphere was great, Karina and Christina helped make the occasion even better.

Had a great time, my server Christina was very nice and welcoming. Last time I came Daniel was always checking up on our table making sure we had everything we needed. Overall had a great time both nights, will come again for the drinks and service.
Amazing food and atmosphere, Karina and Christina were amazing very friendly and great service. They do their job very well!
Food and atmosphere was great, Karina and Christina helped make the occasion even better.

Stopped in with my boyfriend tonight for a quick drink at the bar and ended up having such a good time with the bartenders Annabelle and Matteo, we stayed for dinner! Food and drinks (especially the drinks) were awesome.. we will definitely be back! So fun!

Had a lovely bottle of vinho verde and happy hour beverages while catching up with a friend. Annabel, Dani, and Qam are such sweet staff! If it’s happy hour, be sure to try the spicy guava margarita :)
Maria serviced our table and she was amazing! Very friendly! Highly recommend this place
Maria was a great server, she's very sweet and has great energy
Shout out to our awesome server Maria, she was fast, attentive and very kind! 🙂Good call LPE!
Meklit was great
Meklit was amazing, especially since we were a large group.  Very nice smile and professional!
Fantastic service and remembered our names! Meklit. Definitely recommend
Meklit was absolutely amazing! Great service!

Great spot for the family.
Ewan was excellent!
Ewan was a great server! Thanks for a great night
Euan was very great server good atmosphere. Very accommodating for split bill
Ewan, terrible handwriting but excellent service!! Loved it
Ewan perfect service 👌
Kayla was very nice and respectful. Great service !
Kayla provided friendly and attentive service! The Perogies were bomb and we really liked the Dragon Sauce on the Fried Chicken. Fire.
Love this location. Kayla was a 10/10 server and super friendly! Not a lot of servers ask if you want to keep an empty dish so you can eat all the sauce, but Kayla did!
Kayla was an awesome server and gave us such great service :) First time here, definitely coming to this location again!
Love this place. Food is good, beer list is long. Service pro—thank you Kayla. Prooo.
Akiko and Ben were awesome! Super friendly and made the night better with how personable they were.

Had a lovely bottle of vinho verde and happy hour beverages while catching up with a friend. Annabel, Dani, and Qam are such sweet staff! If it’s happy hour, be sure to try the spicy guava margarita :)
Delicious as always and Danielle was great!
Danielle provided us with excellent service, and made our evening special. Thanks for the great food, and the awesome drinks! Will be back:)

Stopped in with my boyfriend tonight for a quick drink at the bar and ended up having such a good time with the bartenders Annabelle and Matteo, we stayed for dinner! Food and drinks (especially the drinks) were awesome.. we will definitely be back! So fun!
Jackie was great. Very nice, very fresh.
Great food and service! Eli took care of us and did an amazing job!!
Great spot to catch a game! Eli is the man.
We come often to this place, and is fantastic. The food (specially the nachos) are great, good beer selection, and the service is always outstanding. Thanks, Eli, for kepping it up today for us!

Was our first time coming to Local and it was such a great experience!! Kalypsa, our server, was very attentive, friendly and helpful with answering questions about food/drinks. The cold tea and espresso martini were AMAZING!! We’re definitely coming back for happy hour!!
Kalypsa was our server and she was amazing!!! We had such a great time here! The drinks were great and the apps were amazing!! Kalypsa was so attentive and sweet! Best experience ever!

The service by Blake & Elaiza was incredibly friendly and fast. All the dishes had a unique fusion style, and although the flavors were new to me, I really enjoyed them. I would definitely visit again!
Blake and Elaiza were welcoming and cheerful in their approach! Amazing service and great food and beer! On top of that, great ambiance!
Elaiza and Akiko were amazing. Food and atmosphere was very enjoyable. Will go back for sure
My niece and I had the most fun being served by Elaiza and Akiko. Food & drinks were great but our servers were even better! We'll be back.

Truly a local treasure.  Elaiza and Akiko made this experience what it was. While the drinks and food were delicious the servers and management made it so special. If you dine here make a special request for Elaiza and Akiko, you won’t regret it!

Came for the food, stayed for the drinks. Amazing service and atmosphere! It was so inviting, and the staff made me feel really taken care of. Karina was a great server with spot-on recommendations (I’ll definitely be back for the open-faced steak sandwich) and Blake was so friendly at the bar and made great drink suggestions even when I was upset the Verdita wasn’t available. Can't wait to go back when its patio season!

The service by Blake & Elaiza was incredibly friendly and fast. All the dishes had a unique fusion style, and although the flavors were new to me, I really enjoyed them. I would definitely visit again!
Blake and Elaiza were welcoming and cheerful in their approach! Amazing service and great food and beer! On top of that, great ambiance!

I came to local for the first time yesterday and had the best experience! Karina and Blake really took care of me and made great recommendations and great conversation! Will come back just for them :)

Had a great experience thanks to Blake.
Super personable, quick with service, and clearly knows what he's doing behind the bar. He made excellent drinks and kept the vibe fun the whole time. If there were 6 stars, he'd get them without question.

Blake delivered an amazing experience behind the bar. He was friendly, attentive, and kept everything running smoothly even when it got busy. His drinks were spot-on, and his energy made the whole atmosphere better. If there were 6 stars, I’d give them all to him. Highly recommend!

I am looking forward to my next visit!
Karina, Blake & Akiko always takes care of us - they are a joy and make it a fun spot at Local Public Eatery and an easy place to loose the pressures of the busy city.

No food.
Z our waiter was so personable. Nice introduction and compared stories. Attentive. Added to the innate ambience of the location.
Nice patio. Next time upstairs when windows are open

We will be back!
Zivko was awesome. He made our dinner with friends so much fun.

Had a great time, my server Christina was very nice and welcoming. Last time I came Daniel was always checking up on our table making sure we had everything we needed. Overall had a great time both nights, will come again for the drinks and service.

Been here twice now. Food is terrific. Our server/bartender (Carolina)was knowledgeable and gave great tips re. The menu.
One piece of constructive criticism; for the quality of the food here they should offer hand cut fries.
Also the yam fries are so so.

I’ve eaten at great restaurants, travelled to beautiful places, and witnessed incredible things in life… but nothing compares to being served by Carolina at this establishment.

From the moment she steps behind the bar, the entire atmosphere changes. Drinks appear with the precision of Michelangelo creating a masterpiece, and somehow she remembers everyone’s order while also providing better emotional support than most licensed professionals.

At one point Carolina slid my drink across the bar with such grace I considered standing up and saluting.

Five stars isn’t enough. I would personally support renaming a small street in her honour.

Obviously I’m exaggerating here… but honestly, Carolina really is awesome and one of the big reasons we keep coming back.
Carolina is one THE best severs 🙌
